title: centaurea alba subsp. latronum
intro: Centaurea alba subsp. latronum, also known as the White Centaury, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and swelling, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis and gout. Centaurea alba subsp. latronum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
